  • 程序包 org.apache.dubbo.config

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractConfig扩展Object实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      4267533505537413570L

      • 序列化字段

        • id

          String id
          The config id

        • prefix

          String prefix

        • refreshed

          AtomicBoolean refreshed

        • isDefault

          Boolean isDefault
          Is default or not

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractInterfaceConfig扩展AbstractMethodConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -1559314110797223229L

      • 序列化字段

        • interfaceName

          String interfaceName
          The interface name of the exported service

        • version

          String version
          The remote service version the customer/provider side will reference

        • group

          String group
          The remote service group the customer/provider side will reference

        • serviceMetadata

          ServiceMetadata serviceMetadata

        • local

          String local
          Local impl class name for the service interface

        • stub

          String stub
          Local stub class name for the service interface

        • monitor

          MonitorConfig monitor
          Service monitor

        • proxy

          String proxy
          Strategies for generating dynamic agents，there are two strategies can be choosed: jdk and javassist

        • cluster

          String cluster
          Cluster type

        • filter

          String filter
          The Filter when the provider side exposed a service or the customer side references a remote service used, if there are more than one, you can use commas to separate them

        • listener

          String listener
          The Listener when the provider side exposes a service or the customer side references a remote service used if there are more than one, you can use commas to separate them

        • owner

          String owner
          The owner of the service providers

        • connections

          Integer connections
          Connection limits, 0 means shared connection, otherwise it defines the connections delegated to the current service

        • layer

          String layer
          The layer of service providers

        • application

          ApplicationConfig application
          The application info

        • module

          ModuleConfig module
          The module info

        • registries

          List<E> registries
          The registry list the service will register to Also see AbstractInterfaceConfig.registryIds, only one of them will work.

        • methods

          List<E> methods
          The method configuration

        • registryIds

          String registryIds
          The id list of registries the service will register to Also see AbstractInterfaceConfig.registries, only one of them will work.

        • onconnect

          String onconnect

        • ondisconnect

          String ondisconnect
          Disconnection events

        • metrics

          MetricsConfig metrics
          The metrics configuration

        • metadataReportConfig

          MetadataReportConfig metadataReportConfig

        • configCenter

          ConfigCenterConfig configCenter

        • callbacks

          Integer callbacks

        • scope

          String scope

        • tag

          String tag

        • auth

          Boolean auth

        • urls

          List<E> urls
          The url of the reference service

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractMethodConfig扩展AbstractConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • 序列化字段

        • timeout

          Integer timeout
          The timeout for remote invocation in milliseconds

        • retries

          Integer retries
          The retry times

        • actives

          Integer actives
          max concurrent invocations

        • loadbalance

          String loadbalance
          The load balance

        • async

          Boolean async
          Whether to async note that: it is an unreliable asynchronism that ignores return values and does not block threads.

        • sent

          Boolean sent
          Whether to ack async-sent

        • mock

          String mock
          The name of mock class which gets called when a service fails to execute

          note that: the mock doesn't support on the provider side，and the mock is executed when a non-business exception occurs after a remote service call

        • merger

          String merger
          Merger

        • cache

          String cache
          Cache the return result with the call parameter as key, the following options are available: lru, threadlocal, jcache, etc.

        • validation

          String validation
          Whether JSR303 standard annotation validation is enabled or not, if enabled, annotations on method parameters will be validated

        • parameters

          Map<K,V> parameters
          The customized parameters

        • forks

          Integer forks
          Forks for forking cluster

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractReferenceConfig扩展AbstractInterfaceConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -2786526984373031126L

      • 序列化字段

        • check

          Boolean check
          Check if service provider exists, if not exists, it will be fast fail

        • init

          Boolean init
          Whether to eagle-init

        • generic

          String generic
          Whether to use generic interface

        • injvm

          Boolean injvm
          Whether to find reference's instance from the current JVM

        • lazy

          Boolean lazy
          Lazy create connection

        • reconnect

          String reconnect

        • sticky

          Boolean sticky

        • stubevent

          Boolean stubevent
          Whether to support event in stub.

        • providedBy

          String providedBy
          declares which app or service this interface belongs to

        • router

          String router

        • serialization

          String serialization
          The serialization type

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.AbstractServiceConfig扩展AbstractInterfaceConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • 序列化字段

        • version

          String version
          The service version

        • group

          String group
          The service group

        • deprecated

          Boolean deprecated
          whether the service is deprecated

        • delay

          Integer delay
          The time delay register service (milliseconds)

        • export

          Boolean export
          Whether to export the service

        • weight

          Integer weight
          The service weight

        • document

          String document
          Document center

        • dynamic

          Boolean dynamic
          Whether to register as a dynamic service or not on register center, the value is true, the status will be enabled after the service registered,and it needs to be disabled manually; if you want to disable the service, you also need manual processing

        • token

          String token
          Whether to use token

        • accesslog

          String accesslog
          Whether to export access logs to logs

        • protocols

          List<E> protocols
          The protocol list the service will export with Also see AbstractServiceConfig.protocolIds, only one of them will work.

        • protocolIds

          String protocolIds
          The id list of protocols the service will export with Also see AbstractServiceConfig.protocols, only one of them will work.

        • executes

          Integer executes

        • register

          Boolean register
          Whether to register

        • warmup

          Integer warmup
          Warm up period

        • serialization

          String serialization
          The serialization type

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.ApplicationConfig扩展AbstractConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      5508512956753757169L

      • 序列化字段

        • name

          String name
          Application name

        • version

          String version
          The application version

        • owner

          String owner
          Application owner

        • organization

          String organization
          Application's organization (BU)

        • architecture

          String architecture
          Architecture layer

        • environment

          String environment
          Environment, e.g. dev, test or production

        • compiler

          String compiler
          Java compiler

        • logger

          String logger
          The type of the log access

        • registries

          List<E> registries
          Registry centers

        • registryIds

          String registryIds

        • monitor

          MonitorConfig monitor
          Monitor center

        • dumpDirectory

          String dumpDirectory
          Directory for saving thread dump

        • qosEnable

          Boolean qosEnable
          Whether to enable qos or not

        • qosHost

          String qosHost
          The qos host to listen

        • qosPort

          Integer qosPort
          The qos port to listen

        • qosAcceptForeignIp

          Boolean qosAcceptForeignIp
          Should we accept foreign ip or not?

        • parameters

          Map<K,V> parameters
          Customized parameters

        • shutwait

          String shutwait
          Config the shutdown.wait

        • hostname

          String hostname

        • metadataType

          String metadataType
          Metadata type, local or remote, if choose remote, you need to further specify metadata center.

        • registerConsumer

          Boolean registerConsumer

        • repository

          String repository

        • publishInterface

          Boolean publishInterface

        • metadataServicePort

          Integer metadataServicePort
          Metadata Service, used in Service Discovery

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.ArgumentConfig扩展Object实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -2165482463925213595L

      • 序列化字段

        • index

          Integer index
          The argument index: index -1 represents not set

        • type

          String type
          Argument type

        • callback

          Boolean callback
          Whether the argument is the callback interface

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.ConfigCenterConfig扩展AbstractConfig实现可序列化

      • 序列化字段

        • inited

          AtomicBoolean inited

        • protocol

          String protocol

        • address

          String address

        • port

          Integer port

        • cluster

          String cluster

        • namespace

          String namespace

        • group

          String group

        • username

          String username

        • password

          String password

        • timeout

          Long timeout

        • highestPriority

          Boolean highestPriority

        • check

          Boolean check

        • configFile

          String configFile

        • appConfigFile

          String appConfigFile

        • parameters

          Map<K,V> parameters

        • externalConfiguration

          Map<K,V> externalConfiguration

        • appExternalConfiguration

          Map<K,V> appExternalConfiguration

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.ConsumerConfig扩展AbstractReferenceConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      2827274711143680600L

      • 序列化字段

        • client

          String client
          Networking framework client uses: netty, mina, etc.

        • threadpool

          String threadpool
          Consumer thread pool type: cached, fixed, limit, eager

        • corethreads

          Integer corethreads
          Consumer threadpool core thread size

        • threads

          Integer threads
          Consumer threadpool thread size

        • queues

          Integer queues
          Consumer threadpool queue size

        • shareconnections

          Integer shareconnections
          By default, a TCP long-connection communication is shared between the consumer process and the provider process. This property can be set to share multiple TCP long-connection communications. Note that only the dubbo protocol takes effect.

        • urlMergeProcessor

          String urlMergeProcessor
          Url Merge Processor Used to customize the URL merge of consumer and provider

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.MetadataReportConfig扩展AbstractConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      55233L

      • 序列化字段

        • protocol

          String protocol

        • address

          String address

        • port

          Integer port
          Default port for metadata center

        • username

          String username

        • password

          String password

        • timeout

          Integer timeout

        • group

          String group
          The group the metadata in . It is the same as registry

        • parameters

          Map<K,V> parameters

        • retryTimes

          Integer retryTimes

        • retryPeriod

          Integer retryPeriod

        • cycleReport

          Boolean cycleReport
          By default the metadatastore will store full metadata repeatedly every day .

        • syncReport

          Boolean syncReport
          Sync report, default async

        • cluster

          Boolean cluster
          cluster

        • registry

          String registry
          registry id

        • file

          String file
          File for saving metadata center dynamic list

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.MethodConfig扩展AbstractMethodConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      884908855422675941L

      • 序列化字段

        • name

          String name
          The method name

        • stat

          Integer stat
          Stat

        • retry

          Boolean retry
          Whether to retry

        • reliable

          Boolean reliable
          If it's reliable

        • executes

          Integer executes
          Thread limits for method invocations

        • deprecated

          Boolean deprecated
          If it's deprecated

        • sticky

          Boolean sticky
          Whether to enable sticky

        • isReturn

          Boolean isReturn
          Whether need to return

        • oninvoke

          Object oninvoke
          Callback instance when async-call is invoked

        • oninvokeMethod

          String oninvokeMethod
          Callback method when async-call is invoked

        • onreturn

          Object onreturn
          Callback instance when async-call is returned

        • onreturnMethod

          String onreturnMethod
          Callback method when async-call is returned

        • onthrow

          Object onthrow
          Callback instance when async-call has exception thrown

        • onthrowMethod

          String onthrowMethod
          Callback method when async-call has exception thrown

        • arguments

          List<E> arguments
          The method arguments

        • service

          String service
          These properties come from MethodConfig's parent Config module, they will neither be collected directly from xml or API nor be delivered to url

        • serviceId

          String serviceId

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.MetricsConfig扩展AbstractConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -9089919311611546383L

      • 序列化字段

        • port

          String port

        • protocol

          String protocol

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.ModuleConfig扩展AbstractConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      5508512956753757169L

      • 序列化字段

        • name

          String name
          Module name

        • version

          String version
          Module version

        • owner

          String owner
          Module owner

        • organization

          String organization
          Module's organization

        • registries

          List<E> registries
          Registry centers

        • monitor

          MonitorConfig monitor
          Monitor center

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.MonitorConfig扩展AbstractConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -1184681514659198203L

      • 序列化字段

        • protocol

          String protocol
          The protocol of the monitor, if the value is registry, it will search the monitor address from the registry center, otherwise, it will directly connect to the monitor center

        • address

          String address
          The monitor address

        • username

          String username
          The monitor user name

        • password

          String password
          The password

        • group

          String group

        • version

          String version

        • interval

          String interval

        • parameters

          Map<K,V> parameters
          customized parameters

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.ProtocolConfig扩展AbstractConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      6913423882496634749L

      • 序列化字段

        • name

          String name
          Protocol name

        • host

          String host
          Service ip address (when there are multiple network cards available)

        • port

          Integer port
          Service port

        • contextpath

          String contextpath
          Context path

        • threadpool

          String threadpool
          Thread pool

        • threadname

          String threadname
          Thread pool name

        • corethreads

          Integer corethreads
          Thread pool core thread size

        • threads

          Integer threads
          Thread pool size (fixed size)

        • iothreads

          Integer iothreads
          IO thread pool size (fixed size)

        • alive

          Integer alive
          Thread pool keepAliveTime, default unit TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS

        • queues

          Integer queues
          Thread pool's queue length

        • accepts

          Integer accepts
          Max acceptable connections

        • codec

          String codec
          Protocol codec

        • serialization

          String serialization
          Serialization

        • charset

          String charset
          Charset

        • payload

          Integer payload
          Payload max length

        • buffer

          Integer buffer
          Buffer size

        • heartbeat

          Integer heartbeat
          Heartbeat interval

        • accesslog

          String accesslog
          Access log

        • transporter

          String transporter
          Transporter

        • exchanger

          String exchanger
          How information is exchanged

        • dispatcher

          String dispatcher
          Thread dispatch mode

        • networker

          String networker
          Networker

        • server

          String server
          Sever impl

        • client

          String client
          Client impl

        • telnet

          String telnet
          Supported telnet commands, separated with comma.

        • prompt

          String prompt
          Command line prompt

        • status

          String status
          Status check

        • register

          Boolean register
          Whether to register

        • keepAlive

          Boolean keepAlive
          whether it is a persistent connection

        • optimizer

          String optimizer

        • extension

          String extension
          The extension

        • parameters

          Map<K,V> parameters
          The customized parameters

        • sslEnabled

          Boolean sslEnabled

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.ProviderConfig扩展AbstractServiceConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      6913423882496634749L

      • 序列化字段

        • host

          String host
          Service ip addresses (used when there are multiple network cards available)

        • port

          Integer port
          Service port

        • contextpath

          String contextpath
          Context path

        • threadpool

          String threadpool
          Thread pool

        • threadname

          String threadname
          Thread pool name

        • threads

          Integer threads
          Thread pool size (fixed size)

        • iothreads

          Integer iothreads
          IO thread pool size (fixed size)

        • alive

          Integer alive
          Thread pool keepAliveTime, default unit TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS

        • queues

          Integer queues
          Thread pool queue length

        • accepts

          Integer accepts
          Max acceptable connections

        • codec

          String codec
          Protocol codec

        • charset

          String charset
          The serialization charset

        • payload

          Integer payload
          Payload max length

        • buffer

          Integer buffer
          The network io buffer size

        • transporter

          String transporter
          Transporter

        • exchanger

          String exchanger
          How information gets exchanged

        • dispatcher

          String dispatcher
          Thread dispatching mode

        • networker

          String networker
          Networker

        • server

          String server
          The server-side implementation model of the protocol

        • client

          String client
          The client-side implementation model of the protocol

        • telnet

          String telnet
          Supported telnet commands, separated with comma.

        • prompt

          String prompt
          Command line prompt

        • status

          String status
          Status check

        • wait

          Integer wait
          Wait time when stop

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.ReferenceConfig扩展ReferenceConfigBase<T>实现可序列化

      • 序列化字段

        • repository

          ServiceRepository repository

        • bootstrap

          DubboBootstrap bootstrap

        • services

          String services
          The service names that the Dubbo interface subscribed.
          从以下版本开始:
          2.7.8

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.ReferenceConfigBase扩展AbstractReferenceConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -5864351140409987595L

      • 序列化字段

        • interfaceClass

          Class<T> interfaceClass
          The interface class of the reference service

        • client

          String client
          client type

        • url

          String url
          The url for peer-to-peer invocation

        • consumer

          ConsumerConfig consumer
          The consumer config (default)

        • protocol

          String protocol
          Only the service provider of the specified protocol is invoked, and other protocols are ignored.

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.RegistryConfig扩展AbstractConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      5508512956753757169L

      • 序列化字段

        • address

          String address
          Register center address

        • username

          String username
          Username to login register center

        • password

          String password
          Password to login register center

        • port

          Integer port
          Default port for register center

        • protocol

          String protocol
          Protocol for register center

        • transporter

          String transporter
          Network transmission type

        • server

          String server

        • client

          String client

        • cluster

          String cluster
          Affects how traffic distributes among registries, useful when subscribing multiple registries, available options: 1. zone-aware, a certain type of traffic always goes to one Registry according to where the traffic is originated.

        • zone

          String zone
          The region where the registry belongs, usually used to isolate traffics

        • group

          String group
          The group the services registry in

        • version

          String version

        • timeout

          Integer timeout
          Request timeout in milliseconds for register center

        • session

          Integer session
          Session timeout in milliseconds for register center

        • file

          String file
          File for saving register center dynamic list

        • wait

          Integer wait
          Wait time before stop

        • check

          Boolean check
          Whether to check if register center is available when boot up

        • dynamic

          Boolean dynamic
          Whether to allow dynamic service to register on the register center

        • register

          Boolean register
          Whether to export service on the register center

        • subscribe

          Boolean subscribe
          Whether allow to subscribe service on the register center

        • parameters

          Map<K,V> parameters
          The customized parameters

        • simplified

          Boolean simplified
          Simple the registry. both useful for provider and consumer
          从以下版本开始:
          2.7.0

        • extraKeys

          String extraKeys
          After simplify the registry, should add some parameter individually. just for provider.

          such as: extra-keys = A,b,c,d

          从以下版本开始:
          2.7.0

        • useAsConfigCenter

          Boolean useAsConfigCenter
          the address work as config center or not

        • useAsMetadataCenter

          Boolean useAsMetadataCenter
          the address work as remote metadata center or not

        • accepts

          String accepts
          list of rpc protocols accepted by this registry, for example, "dubbo,rest"

        • preferred

          Boolean preferred
          Always use this registry first if set to true, useful when subscribe to multiple registries

        • weight

          Integer weight
          Affects traffic distribution among registries, useful when subscribe to multiple registries Take effect only when no preferred registry is specified.

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.ServiceConfig扩展ServiceConfigBase<T>实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -412700146501624375L

      • 序列化字段

        • serviceName

          String serviceName

        • bootstrap

          DubboBootstrap bootstrap

        • exporters

          List<E> exporters
          The exported services

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.ServiceConfigBase扩展AbstractServiceConfig实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      3033787999037024738L

      • 序列化字段

        • interfaceClass

          Class<T> interfaceClass
          The interface class of the exported service

        • ref

          Object ref
          The reference of the interface implementation

        • path

          String path
          The service name

        • provider

          ProviderConfig provider
          The provider configuration

        • providerIds

          String providerIds
          The providerIds

        • generic

          String generic
          whether it is a GenericService

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.config.SslConfig扩展AbstractConfig实现可序列化

      • 序列化字段

        • inited

          AtomicBoolean inited

        • serverKeyCertChainPath

          String serverKeyCertChainPath

        • serverPrivateKeyPath

          String serverPrivateKeyPath

        • serverKeyPassword

          String serverKeyPassword

        • serverTrustCertCollectionPath

          String serverTrustCertCollectionPath

        • clientKeyCertChainPath

          String clientKeyCertChainPath

        • clientPrivateKeyPath

          String clientPrivateKeyPath

        • clientKeyPassword

          String clientKeyPassword

        • clientTrustCertCollectionPath

          String clientTrustCertCollectionPath

        • ciphers

          List<E> ciphers
          set support cipher

        • protocols

          List<E> protocols
          set support protocols

        • serverKeyCertChainPathStream

          InputStream serverKeyCertChainPathStream

        • serverPrivateKeyPathStream

          InputStream serverPrivateKeyPathStream

        • serverTrustCertCollectionPathStream

          InputStream serverTrustCertCollectionPathStream

        • clientKeyCertChainPathStream

          InputStream clientKeyCertChainPathStream

        • clientPrivateKeyPathStream

          InputStream clientPrivateKeyPathStream

        • clientTrustCertCollectionPathStream

          InputStream clientTrustCertCollectionPathStream

      5766349180380479888L

  • 程序包 org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.ExceedPayloadLimitException扩展IOException实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -1112322085391551410L

  • 程序包 org.apache.dubbo.rpc

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.rpc.AppResponse扩展Object实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      -6925924956850004727L

      • 序列化字段

        • result

          Object result

        • exception

          Throwable exception

        • attachments

          Map<K,V> attachments

        • attributes

          Map<K,V> attributes

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.rpc.AsyncRpcResult扩展Object实现可序列化

      • 序列化字段

        • storedContext

          RpcContext storedContext
          RpcContext may already have been changed when callback happens, it happens when the same thread is used to execute another RPC call. So we should keep the reference of current RpcContext instance and restore it before callback being executed.

        • storedServerContext

          RpcContext storedServerContext

        • executor

          Executor executor

        • invocation

          Invocation invocation

        • responseFuture

          CompletableFuture<T> responseFuture

        • tmpContext

          RpcContext tmpContext
          tmp context to use when the thread switch to Dubbo thread.

        • tmpServerContext

          RpcContext tmpServerContext

        • beforeContext

          BiConsumer<T,U> beforeContext

        • afterContext

          BiConsumer<T,U> afterContext

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.rpc.AttachmentsAdapter.ObjectToStringMap扩展HashMap<String,String>实现可序列化

      • 序列化字段

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcException扩展RuntimeException实现可序列化

      serialVersionUID:
      7815426752583648734L

      • 序列化字段

        • code

          int code
          RpcException cannot be extended, use error code for exception type to keep compatibility

    • 类org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcInvocation扩展Object实现可序列化

        • attachments

          Map<K,V> attachments
          Passed to the remote server during RPC call

        • attributes

          Map<K,V> attributes
          Only used on the caller side, will not appear on the wire.
